title: HP Enterprise (HPE) Shows Fast-paced Momentum But Is Still a Bargain Stock
text: If you are looking for stocks that have gained strong momentum recently but are still trading at reasonable prices, HP Enterprise (HPE) could be a great choice. It is one of the several stocks that passed through our 'Fast-Paced Momentum at a Bargain' screen.

title: Hewlett Packard (HPE) Q3 Earnings Beat, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Hewlett Packard's (HPE) third-quarter results reflect increased demand for its products and services and exceptional performance in areas like the Intelligent Edge and HPE GreenLake.

title: HPE seeing ‘significantly higher' demand for its AI offering, CEO says
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co (NYSE:HPE) is seeing demand for its AI offering accelerate with the company exiting the fiscal third quarter with the largest AI and High Performance Computing (HPC) order book in the IT service provider's history, CEO Antonio Neri said. Neri told investors on a call following the release of the company's earnings after the bell on Tuesday that its results for the quarter were driven by high-growth areas like AI and HPE's cloud service GreenLake.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (HPE) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (NYSE:HPE ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 29, 2023 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Jeff Kvaal - Head of Investor Relations Antonio Neri - President and Chief Executive Officer Jeremy Cox - Interim Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Simon Leopold - Raymond James Aaron Rakers - Wells Fargo Meta Marshall - Morgan Stanley Asiya Merchant - Citi Samik Chatterjee - JPMorgan Wamsi Mohan - Bank of America Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to the Third Quarter Fiscal 2023 Hewlett Packard Enterprise Earnings Conference Call. My name is Gary, and I'll be your conference moderator for today's call.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Tops Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.49 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.46 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.48 per share a year ago.

title: The Afterhours: HP, HP Enterprise, PVH, Box, ZTO Express
text: HP Inc (NYSE:HPQ) shares tumbled more than 6% in extended trading Tuesday after the company's mixed results and tepid guidance failed to impress investors.  The computing company posted fiscal third-quarter revenue of $13.2 billion, down 10% year-over-year and short of the $13.4 billion expected by analysts.

title: HPQ and HPE just reported earnings: Quint Tatro says only one is a ‘buy'
text: HP Inc just reported weaker-than-expected earnings for the third quarter. Its shares are down more than 6.0% in extended hours.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise 3Q financial results edge past estimates as margins improve
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise after Tuesday's close reported that its third quarter 2023 revenue rose 1% to $7 billion, while its earnings for the period increased to $0.35 a share from $0.32 per share a year earlier, driven by Edge product momentum and a portfolio mix shift.   Its adjusted earnings per share, though, came in at $0.49, as its gross margins for the quarter of 35.8% improved 130 basis points from the same period last year.

title: Hewlett-Packard Enterprise Shares Take A Fall On A Mixed Outlook
text: Hewlett-Packard Enterprise reported fiscal third-quarter results that edged by views while its October-quarter outlook came in mixed.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise shares edge up on slight revenue, earnings beat
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co.'s HPE, +0.42% stock inched up 1% in extended trading Tuesday after the computing giant reported quarterly results that edged analyst revenue and earnings estimates. HPE reported fiscal third-quarter net earnings of $464 million, or 35 cents a share, compared with net earnings of $418 million, or 32 cents a share, in the year-ago quarter.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Reports Fiscal 2023 Third Quarter Results
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--HPE reports Q3'23 earnings, which show Edge momentum and the company's portfolio mix shift driving revenue growth and gross margin expansion.

title: Markets Await Jobs Data
text: Pre-market futures are inching back into the green to start a new week — one that will being the end of August 2023, which is headed for the worst performance on the blue-chip Dow since May (-3.4%) and the worst for the S&P 500 (-4%) since December of last year. The Nasdaq has performed even worse: -5.3% month to date, and the more volatile small-cap Russell 2000 really would welcome the end of this trading month: -7.4%.

title: HPE CFO is jumping to RingCentral to become CEO
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co. HPE, +1.04% on Monday said its chief financial officer, Tarek Robbiati, is leaving the company this month to become chief executive of RingCentral Inc. RNG, +0.88%. HPE said Jeremy Cox, senior vice president, corporate controller and chief tax officer, will service as interim CFO while the company and its board conduct a search for a new CFO.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise announces CFO transition plan
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise announces a transition plan for CFO Tarek Robbiati, who will step down later this month to assume an external CEO role.

title: phoenixNAP Powers Expanded AI and Cloud Services with Energy-saving, Ampere-Based Servers from Hewlett Packard Enterprise
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that phoenixNAP, a global IT services provider, is expanding its Bare Metal Cloud platform with cloud-native HPE ProLiant RL300 Gen11 servers, using energy-efficient processors from AmpereⓇ Computing. The expanded services support AI inferencing, cloud gaming and other cloud-native workloads with improved performance and energy efficiency. Enterprise IT today demands mobile-ready, video-intensive, and AI-enabled wo.
